_metadata.description: Fatality locations on and near the Hopkins Street corridor, 2017 and 2025
_metadata.source_2017: Berkeley City Council budget referral, January 2018
_metadata.note: The two 2017 fatalities triggered the Hopkins Street corridor study and its designation as a High-Injury Street in Berkeley's Vision Zero Action Plan (2020). The 2025 fatality occurred after City Council approval of the project, while construction had not yet begun.

properties.description: Pedestrian struck at Hopkins and Monterey Avenue intersection
